title: From Coal To Bauxite Africas Growing Role In Chinas Dry Bulk Supply Chain
section_path: From Coal To Bauxite Africas Growing Role In Chinas Dry Bulk Supply Chain
section_path_text: From Coal To Bauxite Africas Growing Role In Chinas Dry Bulk Supply Chain
summary:
Main
Allied Quantumsea's latest research reviews how China's shifting commodity demand, from coal to bauxite and high-grade iron ore, is elevating Africa's role in dry bulk trade, with Guinea and South Africa at the center of the supply chain realignment. The first half of 2025 saw significant shifts in dry bulk commodity flows, particularly in the mineral trade segment. Guinea cemented its position as the world's top bauxite exporter, with volumes rising 36% year-on-year to nearly 100 million tonnes driven largely by Chinese demand.
